title: Perform ante and post-mortem inspection - Deer
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform ante and post-mortem inspection - Deer demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for ante-mortem inspection

pcs.text: Identify regulatory requirements associated with ante-mortem inspection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulatory requirements associated with ante-mortem inspection?
